professional_summary.en: Tariq Al-Khathami is a Saudi engineer, project leader, and inventor known for his contributions to engineering innovation, industrial technologies, and applied research within the energy sector.
professional_summary.ar: طارق الخثعمي مهندس سعودي وقائد مشاريع ومخترع يُعرف بإسهاماته في الابتكار الهندسي والتقنيات الصناعية والبحث التطبيقي في قطاع الطاقة.

career_identity.description: Represents a new generation of Saudi engineers engaged in advanced engineering innovation, industrial technologies, and applied technological development.

roles: Leader of Mechanical Production cohort in the Technical College
Leader of Chemical Production cohort in the Technical College
Leader of Chemical Engineering cohort at Bahrain Polytechnic

education_initiative.description: Contributed to enabling a pathway for diploma graduates to continue their studies in Chemical Engineering at Bahrain Polytechnic after bridging programs were suspended in Saudi technical colleges.
education_initiative.impact: Enabled many Saudi students to continue their academic journey toward engineering degrees.

patent_highlights: Systems and Processes for Chemical Processing

community_contribution.description: Encouraged peers and fellow engineers to pursue innovation and patent development, contributing to the spread of innovation culture.

professional_influence.description: Maintains a professional audience of thousands of followers interested in engineering, innovation, and technology.

tribal_identity.description: Belongs to the historic Khath'am tribe and is regarded as a contemporary figure appreciated for achievements in engineering and innovation.

professional_positioning.description: A rising Saudi inventor combining engineering leadership, academic initiative, and technological innovation.
